commands_analyzed.name: adhd-morning-assistant.md
failure_patterns: Abstract Solution Syndrome - 308 lines for 3 time blocks
Feature Creep - Memory integration, pattern learning, energy forecasting
Premature Optimization - Planning patterns before validation

savage_rating.commentary: Claims to help ADHD brains but creates more overwhelm than a caffeinated squirrel in a nut factory. Complexity score of 8 proves this command has ADHD - it can't focus on doing ONE thing well.

commands_analyzed.name: ultrathink-hybrid-mcp.md

performance_analysis.real_world_utility: NEGATIVE - Adds complexity to think about complexity

failure_patterns: Meta-Everything Disease - Thinking about thinking about thinking
Framework Fallacy - 535 lines to do what humans do naturally
Intellectual Masturbation - Confidence gating for basic reasoning

savage_rating.commentary: 535 lines of 'thinking' that could be replaced with 'think harder.' Token usage of 2,080 makes this the most expensive way to think since hiring consultants. The confidence gating system ironically shows ZERO confidence in simple solutions.

commands_analyzed.name: reasoning-wrapper.md
failure_patterns: Solution Looking for Problem - Creates reasoning where none needed
Template Explosion - Multiple modes for simple task

savage_rating.commentary: Meta-reasoning about meta-reasoning - it's turtles all the way down! 414 lines to add 'thinking' to commands, when the real thinking would be: DON'T BUILD THIS. It's like building a wrapper for your wrapper wrapper.

commands_analyzed.name: java-test-driven-development.md
failure_patterns: Manual Syndrome - 459 lines to explain 3 steps
Pattern Proliferation - Multiple templates for basic TDD
Teaching vs Doing - More documentation than automation

savage_rating.commentary: Turns the elegant simplicity of TDD into a 459-line monster. Red-Green-Refactor becomes Red-Green-Refactor-Read-Novel. If Kent Beck saw this, he'd refactor himself into a different profession.

abstract_solution_syndrome.description: Solving imaginary problems with real complexity

meta_everything_disease.description: Building abstractions on top of abstractions

framework_fallacy.description: Building frameworks when simple functions suffice

immediate_actions: Delete 85-90% of content from each command
Collapse multiple commands into single utilities

savage_conclusions.systemic_issue: Commands are solutions looking for problems
savage_conclusions.recommended_action: BURN IT ALL DOWN AND START OVER
savage_conclusions.final_verdict: These aren't commands, they're manifestos. The real intelligence would be recognizing that simple problems need simple solutions, not 500-line thought experiments.
